summary_en: 700,000 shares (3.61% of outstanding) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026 at ¥583/share (closing price May 15), maximum total ¥408.1M. CARTA HOLDINGS (4th largest shareholder) has indicated intention to offer all holdings. Rationale: responsive capital policy and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Cross Marketing Group's board of directors resolved on May 15, 2026 to acquire up to 700,000 treasury shares (3.61% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) via off-exchange transaction (ToSTNeT-3) on May 18, 2026 at ¥583 per share (the May 15 closing price), for a maximum total consideration of ¥408.1 million. The purchase order is submitted as a single-session order during the designated ToSTNeT-3 trading window on the morning of May 18 at 08:45 JST on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company states the acquisition is undertaken to execute responsive capital policy in light of changing business conditions and to enhance capital efficiency. Notably, CARTA HOLDINGS (the company's 4th largest shareholder) has notified the company of its intention to offer all of its Cross Marketing Group shares in response to this purchase program. Results will be disclosed after the trading window closes.
